use_cases.name: DiamondCast Live
use_cases.description: Real-time MLB game tracker with MCP connector to MLB Stats API. Live pitch-by-pitch updates, box scores, spray charts, and win probability. SSE-powered feed renders pitch sequence visualizations, batter/pitcher matchup cards, and live base-runner diagrams.
features: MCP connector to MLB Stats API

use_cases.name: PitchLab Analytics
use_cases.description: Advanced baseball analytics dashboard consuming Statcast data via MCP. Pitch movement plots, exit velocity heatmaps, expected stats (xBA, xSLG, xwOBA), and spin rate leaderboards. Filterable by team, player, date range with animated pitch tunneling overlays.

design.vibe: Data science dark with neon accents

use_cases.name: DugoutFeed MLB
use_cases.description: Multi-game MLB scoreboard with MCP-driven live feeds for every active game. Split-screen view showing up to 8 simultaneous games with condensed box scores, highlight alerts, and scoring play breakdowns. Redis pub/sub for cross-game event correlation.

use_cases.name: GridIron Pulse
use_cases.description: Live NFL game tracker with MCP connector to ESPN and SportRadar APIs. Play-by-play feed with animated field position diagram, drive charts, and real-time player stat overlays. Win probability shifts on every play with momentum indicators.
features: red zone alerts with haptic pulse

design.vibe: Game day dark with electric orange

use_cases.name: SnapRoute Fantasy
use_cases.description: Fantasy football live scoring dashboard with MCP feeds pulling player stats from multiple providers. Real-time fantasy point calculations, matchup comparisons, start/sit recommendations with projected vs actual overlay. Alert system for touchdown and big play events.

use_cases.name: BlitzBoard NFL
use_cases.description: NFL RedZone-style multi-game dashboard driven by MCP connectors. Automatically surfaces the most exciting active plays across all games using AI-scored excitement ranking. Countdown timers, scoring probability heat zones, and condensed highlights feed.

use_cases.name: CourtVision Live
use_cases.description: Real-time NBA game tracker with MCP connector to balldontlie and NBA Stats API. Shot chart canvas updating live, player efficiency cards, run tracker showing scoring streaks, and play-by-play feed with assist/turnover flow diagrams.
features: MCP connector to NBA Stats API

use_cases.name: FastBreak Feed
use_cases.description: NBA multi-game scoreboard with MCP live feeds. Bento grid layout showing all active games with mini shot charts, live leader boards, and quarter scores. Highlight reel section surfaces dunks, blocks, and three-pointers across all games in real-time.

use_cases.name: HoopMetrics Pro
use_cases.description: Advanced NBA analytics dashboard with MCP connector pulling player tracking data. Pace and space metrics, clutch time performance breakdowns, lineup combination analysis, and pace-adjusted efficiency ratings with historical comparison overlays.
features: MCP connector to NBA advanced stats

design.vibe: Analytics dark with cyan data viz

use_cases.name: GoalStorm Tracker
use_cases.description: Live soccer match tracker with MCP connector to Football-Data.org and API-Football. Real-time match events feed, animated pitch heatmap showing player positions, possession flow diagram, and expected goals (xG) timeline per shot.

use_cases.name: PitchMap Global
use_cases.description: Multi-league soccer dashboard covering EPL, La Liga, Serie A, Bundesliga, Ligue 1 via MCP feeds. Live scores grid grouped by league, form tables, top scorers leaderboard, and upcoming fixture countdown tiles with betting odds from The Odds API.
features: MCP connector to The Odds API

use_cases.name: TransferRadar Live
use_cases.description: Soccer transfer window tracker with MCP connectors scraping transfer news feeds and official club announcements. Rumor confidence scoring, deal progress timeline, fee comparison charts, and player value trajectory graphs using TransferMarkt data.

use_cases.name: OctagonView Live
use_cases.description: Live UFC fight night tracker with MCP connector to UFC Stats API. Round-by-round scorecards, strike accuracy heatmap on body diagram, takedown success rate, significant strike differential chart, and judge scorecard prediction model.
features: MCP connector to UFC Stats API

design.vibe: Octagon cage dark with gold accents

use_cases.name: FightCard Central
use_cases.description: UFC event dashboard showing full fight card with MCP-driven fighter comparison stats. Tale of the tape overlays, win method distribution pie charts, striking/grappling radar charts, and reach advantage visualizations. Live odds feed from sportsbook APIs.
features: MCP UFC fight card data feed
tale of the tape comparison overlay

design.vibe: Fight night dark with blood red

use_cases.name: MMATracker Pro
use_cases.description: Multi-promotion MMA tracker covering UFC, Bellator, ONE, PFL via MCP feed aggregation. Fighter ranking cross-reference, upcoming fight calendar, result feed with finish type tagging, and pound-for-pound ranking comparison across promotions.
features: result feed with finish type tags

design.vibe: Combat sports dark with flame orange

use_cases.name: GrappleStats MMA
use_cases.description: MMA grappling analytics platform with MCP connector to Sherdog and Tapology stats. Submission chain visualizations, position control time breakdowns, scramble success rates, and jiu-jitsu lineage tree graph showing fighter training connections.

use_cases.name: RingPulse Boxing
use_cases.description: Live boxing fight tracker with MCP feed for punch stats, round scoring, and CompuBox-style analytics. Round-by-round punch output bars, power vs jab ratio pie, connect percentage gauges, and judge scorecard simulator based on punch stats.

use_cases.name: BeltChase Boxing
use_cases.description: Boxing rankings and title tracker with MCP connectors to WBC, WBA, IBF, WBO ranking feeds. Belt holder cards with defense count, mandatory challenger queue, unified/undisputed title tracker, and division-by-division comparison grids.
features: belt holder cards with defense count

use_cases.name: AllSport Ticker
use_cases.description: Universal sports ticker consuming live feeds from 7+ sports via MCP connector hub. Horizontal scrolling ticker bar with score updates, configurable sport filters, priority alerts for favorites, and expandable detail cards on click.

use_cases.name: ScoreStack Feed
use_cases.description: Stacked card-based sports feed aggregating MCP data from MLB, NFL, NBA, soccer, UFC, and boxing. Each sport renders its own card template pattern — diamond for baseball, field for football, court for basketball, octagon for UFC. Unified notification system.

use_cases.name: BetPulse Odds
use_cases.description: Cross-sport live odds dashboard with MCP connector to The Odds API and multiple sportsbooks. Real-time line movement charts, value bet detection, arbitrage finder, parlay builder, and historical odds accuracy tracking.
features: MCP connector to The Odds API

use_cases.name: FanZone Social
use_cases.description: Social sports feed combining live game data with fan reactions via MCP connectors. Live game events trigger reaction polls, sentiment gauges, and chat threads. Integrates game MCP feeds with social MCP (Twitter/Reddit) for cross-platform fan pulse.
features: MCP game feed + social feed mashup
live reaction polls on game events

design.vibe: Social dark with fan energy pink

use_cases.name: StatForge Builder
use_cases.description: No-code sports dashboard builder with MCP connector marketplace. Users drag-and-drop widgets (charts, tables, tickers, maps) and connect them to any registered MCP sports feed. Template marketplace for sharing dashboard configs as JSON.

use_cases.name: PropLine Analyzer
use_cases.description: Player prop betting analyzer with MCP feeds for player stats across all major sports. Compares player averages to prop lines, calculates cover probabilities, tracks historical over/under streaks, and surfaces high-confidence edges.

use_cases.name: InjuryWatch Feed
use_cases.description: Cross-sport injury report tracker with MCP connectors to team injury feeds, press conferences, and social media. Injury timeline per player, return-to-play probability model, fantasy impact scoring, and lineup projection adjustments.

use_cases.name: DraftBoard Scout
use_cases.description: Multi-sport draft prospect tracker with MCP feeds for college stats, combine results, and mock drafts. Big board visualization, prospect comparison radar charts, team need mapping, and draft pick trade value calculator.

use_cases.name: ClockSync Scheduler
use_cases.description: Personal sports calendar that syncs game times via MCP connectors for all followed teams across sports. Timezone-aware scheduling, conflict detection when games overlap, watch priority ranking, and TV channel/streaming service lookup.

use_cases.name: HighlightReel AI
use_cases.description: AI-curated sports highlight feed powered by MCP connectors to play-by-play data. Detects high-excitement moments (scores, knockouts, buzzer beaters) across all active games. Generates highlight cards with context, timestamps, and AI play descriptions.

design.vibe: Highlight reel dark with hot pink

use_cases.name: VenueMap Sports
use_cases.description: Interactive sports venue map with MCP feeds for live game status at every stadium. Globe/map view showing active games with pulsing indicators, venue capacity heatmaps, weather conditions at outdoor venues, and travel planner for sports tourism.

use_cases.name: RivalryGraph Live
use_cases.description: Historical rivalry tracker with MCP feeds for head-to-head records across all sports. Series history timelines, all-time stat comparisons, rivalry heat index based on recent games, and fan intensity metrics from social MCP feeds.

design.vibe: Rivalry fire dark with orange flame
